findings.evidence: The local orbit criterion is already available at `SubgroupFiberOrbit.lean:78`, cancellation of the fibre action is the only deck-action hypothesis used at `Connected.lean:90`, and the normalizer equality criterion is `Algebra/Group/NormalizerQuotient.lean:164`.
findings.fix: Remove the pretransitivity hypothesis and prove from `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff`, `IsCancelSMul.right_cancel`, `[H.Normal]`, and `Subgroup.normalizerQuotientMk_eq_iff_div_mem`; keep only `[IsCancelSMul (Deck p) (p ⁻¹' {b})]` plus `[H.Normal]`.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff_normalizerQuotientMk_inv_eq` assumes `[MulAction.IsPretransitive (Deck p) (p ⁻¹' {b})]`, but the statement only compares two translates of the fixed point `e` and does not need transitivity of the fibre action.

findings.evidence: The proof’s `letI := hreg.fiber_isPretransitive b` at line 232 feeds only the too-strong hypothesis above; `fiber_isCancelSMul (b := b) hp` at line 233 is enough for the generalized theorem.
findings.fix: After weakening the base lemma, weaken this wrapper to the standard preconnected-cover cancellation hypotheses, i.e. use `hp : IsCoveringMap p` with `[PreconnectedSpace E]` and no `hreg`, or rename it if retaining a regular-specialized alias as a derived convenience.
findings.issue: `regularSubgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff_normalizerQuotientMk_inv_eq` requires `hreg : IsRegular p` only to manufacture the unnecessary pretransitivity instance for the previous lemma.

summary: The base-orbit criterion is now at the right generic action level, but the new two-translate normalizer criterion still carries unnecessary transitivity/regularity assumptions. Drop those stronger hypotheses and prove the criterion from orbit equality plus freeness and normality.
